ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "service_time" INTEGER /* Service time of the player in years */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the season is a regular season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_stats" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy-stat-player-season combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "ratio_ip" REAL /* Ratio of innings pitched */,
  "next_war" REAL /* Next WAR (Wins Above Replacement) */,
  "games_per_game" REAL /* Games per game */,
  "is_starter" INTEGER /* Whether the player is a starter */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "position_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player at their position in fantasy */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the player in fantasy */,
  "projection_website" TEXT /* Name of the website providing the projections */,
  "projection_date" TEXT /* Date of the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-stat-season combination */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "hits_scored" INTEGER /* Total hits scored by the team */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Total hits allowed by the team */,
  "walks_scored" INTEGER /* Total walks scored by the team */,
  "walks_allowed" INTEGER /* Total walks allowed by the team */,
  "strikeouts_scored" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts scored by the team */,
  "strikeouts_allowed" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts allowed by the team */,
  "home_games" INTEGER /* Number of home games played */,
  "away_games" INTEGER /* Number of away games played */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "run_differential" INTEGER /* Run differential (runs scored - runs allowed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, scheduled) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the opponent team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the opponent team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the opponent team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the opponent team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the opponent team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the opponent team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)
